title: MEMORY.md silent truncation — Claude Code loads max 200 lines, critical rules were invisible
signal: MEMORY.md was 276 lines. Claude Code silently truncates at 200 lines. The last 76 lines contained critical rules from sessions 62-88 (Lug PEV Gate, Verify-to-Falsify, Teaching Dogfood Gate, Context Measurement, Ozi Routing, Detect-Signal-Route, Wakeup Prompts fix, Closeout Banner fix). These rules were invisible at every session start — models were operating without them and there was no indication of the truncation. Fixed by lossless compression: prose sections moved to topic files, MEMORY.md is now 47 lines (pure dense index), all content accessible via pointers.
rationale: MEMORY.md is loaded into every session. Truncation is silent — no warning, no error. The 76 truncated lines were recent hard rules (sessions 62-88), meaning the most recent behavioral corrections were the ones being lost. Any MEMORY.md > 200 lines has this problem. Pattern: keep MEMORY.md as pure index (pointers + 1-line descriptions), prose in topic files loaded on-demand.
